title: switch
description: pass messages from a specified inlet

messages.description: sets which inlet is open (0 — all closed)
any message to pass through the switch
message from the switched on inlet

arguments.description: set the 'n' number of inlets (from 2 to 100)

body: [switch] outputs data from the inlet that's "switched on". Just one inlet from 'n' inlets can send data, or none of them.
